---
name: Documentation Content Request
about: Request new documentation pages or improvements to existing sections
title: "[Docs Request]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Requested Documentation

Describe the documentation you would like to see added or improved.

Examples:

- A new tutorial explaining how to deploy AegisLab
- Documentation for a specific architecture component
- Additional examples for algorithm development
- More detailed setup instructions

---

## Why Is This Needed?

Explain why this documentation would be useful.

Examples:

- A feature is difficult to understand without documentation
- Existing documentation is incomplete
- Many users may encounter the same confusion

---

## Proposed Content (Optional)

If you have ideas for what the page should include, describe them here.

Examples:

- Step-by-step guide
- Code examples
- Architecture explanation
- Troubleshooting section

---

## Related Documentation

If applicable, provide links to related documentation pages.

Example:

https://operationspai.github.io/AegisLab-doc/...

---

## Additional Context

Add any additional context that may help maintainers understand your request.

Examples:

- Links to related discussions
- References to external documentation
- Screenshots or examples
